label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me read this passage carefully. The passage starts by talking about how both men and women are surrounded by media that focuses on dieting, exercise, fashion, and hairstyles. It mentions that for men, the past idea of being smart and handsome by just wearing a nice suit is gone. Then it references a survey by the University of the West of England (UWE) that found 80% of men are unhappy with their bodies, specifically mentioning beer bellies and lack of muscles. The next part discusses the idea that this change might be due to the influence of role models seen on TV and in magazines, which set a standard for the perfect body. It also mentions a product, a muscle-enhancing shirt, which is criticized as a gimmick by Joe Warner, who argues people should exercise instead of taking shortcuts.
